notes: Entry requires BOTH a 5m VPVR-touch AND a 1h alignment in the same direction.
1h alignment is computed as the slope of close over 12 bars: positive => long bias, negative => short bias.
Only when the 1h trend agrees with the 5m VPVR-touch do we enter — this filters out counter-trend mean reversion.
Exit is 2x ATR trailing (different from V6 — different axis implies different exit family).
Direction: long+short (bidirectional). Universe: BTCUSDT + ETHUSDT (multi-symbol required).
